creator: lichray@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> lichray, another ping.
> 
> Are you going to look at this port soon?

I have no time to do so right now.  If someone want to look at this, he/she can just backports the changes we made here:

  https://github.com/HirotoKagotani/freebsd-fcitx/tree/master/chinese/fcitx

(The repository is a for a new version of fcitx, but we stuck with some dependency issue related to other ports).
